name: ¤ ⊰ VOLO ⊱ ¤
description:
You find something out of place on Route 1.

(Art by @scepterno on Tumblr!)

(Requested by @DustyElixir! you a real one fr)

Intro message is inspired by @deadtower on ao3, specifically the fic ‘Inimicus Dei’ because holy shit i love deadtowers interpretation of the pokemon universe and writing style, good shit

As is the case with my Guzma bots, this guy is also gonna be full of headcanon, including him being transmasc, so if u don’t like it u can steal this bot to change it and use it privately, or go lick a fencepost or something

Folks im afraid i cooked with this one. straight cheffing it. gourmet religious trauma. cook that shit up quay.

Context: Volo wants answers. Understanding of why it couldn’t have been him who was chosen. Volo gets what he asked for and more than he bargained for. You find what remains on your local Route 1.

AKA “hey guys, i found this cute guy muttering to himself in a bloody crumpled heap in the woods, he seems chill but he wont stop drawing tgis weird stupid glyph on the walls of my house 👇. should i keep him?”
creator: spiralclef
